title: patagonium pusillum
side_effects: Patagonium pusillum can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and increased heart rate. In severe cases, prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds can cause liver damage and even respiratory failure. Some individuals may experience nausea, dizziness, and headaches after ingesting the plant, while others may develop skin rashes or blisters. Improper use of Patagonium pusillum can also lead to interactions with other medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
